title: CometChat: Conversations, without the chaos | Product Hunt
excerpt: CometChat packs chat, voice, video, and AI Agents into one full-stack conversations platform - so you can stop duct-taping random tools and praying they play nice. Safety, moderation, and analytics come baked in, keeping things smooth as you scale. Flexible integration options for any stack you’ve got - because our job is running the infra, not making you babysit it.
content_html: CometChat packs chat, voice, video, and AI Agents into one full-stack conversations platform - so you can stop duct-taping random tools and praying they play nice. Safety, moderation, and analytics come baked in, keeping things smooth as you scale. Flexible integration options for any stack you’ve got - because our job is running the infra, not making you babysit it.

sentences.en: CometChat packs chat, voice, video, and AI Agents into one full-stack conversations platform - so you can stop duct-taping random tools and praying they play nice.
sentences.zh: CometChat 将聊天、语音、视频和 AI 代理打包到一个全栈对话平台中 - 这样您就可以停止使用管道胶带随意工具并祈祷它们运行良好。

sentences.en: Safety, moderation, and analytics come baked in, keeping things smooth as you scale.
sentences.zh: 安全性、适度性和分析功能已融入其中，让您在扩展时保持顺利。

sentences.en: Flexible integration options for any stack you’ve got - because our job is running the infra, not making you babysit it.
sentences.zh: 为您拥有的任何堆栈提供灵活的集成选项 - 因为我们的工作是运行基础设施，而不是让您照顾它。

content_html_zh: CometChat 将聊天、语音、视频和 AI 代理打包到一个全栈对话平台中 - 这样您就可以停止使用管道胶带随意工具并祈祷它们运行良好。 安全性、适度性和分析功能已融入其中，让您在扩展时保持顺利。 为您拥有的任何堆栈提供灵活的集成选项 - 因为我们的工作是运行基础设施，而不是让您照顾它。
